summary: Complete testing of Customer Forgot Password feature (Glömt lösenord). All backend APIs (12 pytest tests) passed. Full E2E flow tested: register user → forgot password → get reset code from DB → reset password → login with new password. Frontend UI fully functional with all required elements.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (3/min for forgot-password, 5/min for reset-password) can cause test failures if run too quickly. This is expected security behavior.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 pytest tests passed + full E2E flow verified)

seed_data_creation: Test users created and cleaned up after testing. No persistent test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer forgot-password feature fully tested. All flows working: forgot-password request (creates reset code in DB), reset-password with valid code, password validation (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char), login with new password. Rate limiting is enabled (3/min forgot-password, 5/min reset-password). Email sending via Resend may fail for unverified domains but reset code is still created in DB.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/auth/forgot-password (non-exis: ✓ Returns 200 with generic message (doesn't reveal if email exists)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/auth/forgot-password (valid cu: ✓ Returns 200 and creates reset code in DB

frontend_ui_tests.login_page_elements: ✓ Login form with email, password inputs
frontend_ui_tests.forgot_password_form: ✓ Shows email input and 'Skicka återställningskod' button
frontend_ui_tests.reset_password_form: ✓ Shows code input, new password, confirm password fields
frontend_ui_tests.success_toast: ✓ 'En återställningskod har skickats till din e-post' toast shown

verified_features.customer_forgot_password_request: ✓ Creates reset code in user_password_resets collection
verified_features.password_validation: ✓ Requires 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char
verified_features.reset_code_single_use: ✓ Code marked as used after successful reset
verified_features.email_not_revealed: ✓ Same response for existing and non-existing emails
